name: Love on Lo
original_name: สเกาท์รักที่พักใจ
overview: Golf is a cheerful and good-humored man who was assigned the task of finding a place to take photos during the New Year countdown and encountered Pond, a man devoid of emotions or feelings. They both encountered something that caused them to be in the same room. But their differences create feelings for each other.

trailers.title: Love On Lo สเกาท์รักที่พักใจ | Official Teaser | WeTV [ENG SUB]
